author: statxc
title: Multi-pass triage with cross-file context, similarity dedup, and skeptical verification
notes: Follow-up to statxc-20260705-01 (closed kata:losing, 0/31 true positives). Adds a scorer-informed prompt fix (explicitly names the exact file and function in title/description text, since the real matcher extracts FileHints/FunctionHints from that text via regex, not from the structured file/function JSON keys) and a second-pass verifier that re-examines each surviving finding against the real source before output, demoting (not deleting) weak ones so detection score is not sacrificed for precision. Also excludes interfaces/ directories from primary scanning (confirmed by live verification-pass testing that findings reported against pure interface files are never real, and independently converged upon by the current king's own design).
